title: Async functions should not contain synchronous HTTP client calls
description: This rule checks if an async function contains synchronous HTTP client calls. It is recommended to use async HTTP libraries for better performance and concurrency.
message: Async function contains synchronous HTTP client call

noncompliant.description: Async function with synchronous HTTP client call

compliant.code:
import asyncio
async def my_async_function():
    async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:
        async with session.get('http://example.com') as response:
            ...
compliant.description: Async function using aiohttp for async HTTP client call

why_is_this_an_issue: Synchronous HTTP client calls in async functions can block the event loop, reducing performance and concurrency.
how_to_fix: Replace synchronous HTTP client calls with async alternatives, such as aiohttp.

checks.message: Async function contains synchronous HTTP client call.
